Package ci.gouv.dgbf.system.budgetaryclassification.server.api

Interface ExpenditureActivityService.ExpenditureActivitySaveRequestDto

All Known Implementing Classes:
ExpenditureActivityService.ExpenditureActivityCreateRequestDto, ExpenditureActivityService.ExpenditureActivityUpdateRequestDto
Enclosing interface:
ExpenditureActivityService
public static interface ExpenditureActivityService.ExpenditureActivitySaveRequestDto
Cette interface représente une requête d'enregistrement.
Author:
Arnaud
